verses.latin_vulgate: Alleluja.   Confitemini Domino, et invocate nomen ejus ;  annuntiate inter gentes opera ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הוֹד֣וּ לַ֭יהֹוָה קִרְא֣וּ בִשְׁמ֑וֹ הוֹדִ֥יעוּ בָ֝עַמִּ֗ים עֲלִילוֹתָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: Give glory to the Lord, and call upon his name: declare his deeds among the Gentiles.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kiittäkäät Herraa, ja saarnatkaat hänen nimeänsä, julistakaat hänen töitänsä kansain seassa!
verses.king_james: O give thanks unto the Lord; call upon his name: make known his deeds among the people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cantate ei, et psallite ei ;  narrate omnia mirabilia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִֽׁירוּ־ל֭וֹ זַמְּרוּ־ל֑וֹ שִׂ֝֗יחוּ בְּכׇל־נִפְלְאוֹתָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: Sing to him, yea sing praises to him: relate all his wondrous works.
verses.finnish_biblia: Veisatkaat hänelle, soittakaat hänelle, puhukaat kaikista hänen ihmeistänsä.
verses.king_james: Sing unto him, sing psalms unto him: talk ye of all his wondrous works.

verses.latin_vulgate: Laudamini in nomine sancto ejus ;  lætetur cor quærentium Dominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִֽ֭תְהַלְלוּ בְּשֵׁ֣ם קׇדְשׁ֑וֹ יִ֝שְׂמַ֗ח לֵ֤ב ׀ מְבַקְשֵׁ֬י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Glory ye in his holy name: let the heart of them rejoice that seek the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ylistäkäät hänen pyhää nimeänsä: niiden sydän iloitkaan, jotka etsivät Herraa!
verses.king_james: Glory ye in his holy name: let the heart of them rejoice that seek the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quærite Dominum, et confirmamini ;  quærite faciem ejus semper.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דִּרְשׁ֣וּ יְהֹוָ֣ה וְעֻזּ֑וֹ בַּקְּשׁ֖וּ פָנָ֣יו תָּמִֽיד׃
verses.douay_rheims: Seek ye the Lord, and be strengthened: seek his face evermore.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kysykäät Herraa ja hänen voimaansa, etsikäät alati hänen kasvojansa!
verses.king_james: Seek the Lord, and his strength: seek his face evermore.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mementote mirabilium ejus quæ fecit ;  prodigia ejus, et judicia oris ejus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זִכְר֗וּ נִפְלְאוֹתָ֥יו אֲשֶׁר־עָשָׂ֑ה מֹ֝פְתָ֗יו וּמִשְׁפְּטֵי־פִֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: Remember his marvellous works which he hath done; his wonders, and the judgments of his mouth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Muistakaat hänen ihmeellisiä töitänsä, jotka hän tehnyt on, hänen ihmeitänsä ja hänen sanojansa.
verses.king_james: Remember his marvellous works that he hath done; his wonders, and the judgments of his mouth;

verses.latin_vulgate: semen Abraham servi ejus ;  filii Jacob electi ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֶ֭רַע אַבְרָהָ֣ם עַבְדּ֑וֹ בְּנֵ֖י יַעֲקֹ֣ב בְּחִירָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: O ye seed of Abraham his servant; ye sons of Jacob his chosen.
verses.finnish_biblia: Te Abrahamin hänen palveliansa siemen, te Jakobin hänen valittunsa lapset.
verses.king_james: O ye seed of Abraham his servant, ye children of Jacob his chosen.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipse Dominus Deus noster ;  in universa terra judicia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֭וּא יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֵ֑ינוּ בְּכׇל־הָ֝אָ֗רֶץ מִשְׁפָּטָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: He is the Lord our God: his judgments are in all the earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänpä on Herra meidän Jumalamme: hän tuomitsee kaikessa maailmassa.
verses.king_james: He is the Lord our God: his judgments are in all the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Memor fuit in sæculum testamenti sui ;  verbi quod mandavit in mille generationes :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זָכַ֣ר לְעוֹלָ֣ם בְּרִית֑וֹ דָּבָ֥ר צִ֝וָּ֗ה לְאֶ֣לֶף דּֽוֹר׃
verses.douay_rheims: He hath remembered his covenant for ever: the word which he commanded to a thousand generations.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän muistaa liittonsa ijankaikkisesti, sanansa, jonka hän on käskenyt tuhannelle sukukunnalle,
verses.king_james: He hath remembered his covenant for ever, the word which he commanded to a thousand generations.

verses.latin_vulgate: quod disposuit ad Abraham,  et juramenti sui ad Isaac :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲשֶׁ֣ר כָּ֭רַת אֶת־אַבְרָהָ֑ם וּשְׁב֖וּעָת֣וֹ לְיִשְׂחָֽק׃
verses.douay_rheims: Which he made to Abraham; and his oath to Isaac:
verses.finnish_biblia: Jonka hän teki Abrahamin kanssa, ja valansa Isaakin kanssa.
verses.king_james: Which covenant he made with Abraham, and his oath unto Isaac;

verses.latin_vulgate: et statuit illud Jacob in præceptum,  et Israël in testamentum æternum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעֲמִידֶ֣הָ לְיַעֲקֹ֣ב לְחֹ֑ק לְ֝יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל בְּרִ֣ית עוֹלָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he appointed the same to Jacob for a law, and to Israel for an everlasting testament:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja pani sen Jakobille säädyksi ja Israelille ijankaikkiseksi liitoksi,
verses.king_james: And confirmed the same unto Jacob for a law, and to Israel for an everlasting covenant:

verses.latin_vulgate: dicens : Tibi dabo terram Chanaan,  funiculum hæreditatis vestræ :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֵאמֹ֗ר לְךָ֗ אֶתֵּ֥ן אֶת־אֶֽרֶץ־כְּנָ֑עַן חֶ֝֗בֶל נַחֲלַתְכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Saying: To thee will I give the land of Chanaan, the lot of your inheritance.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sanoi: sinulle minä annan Kanaanin maan, teidän perimisenne arvan.
verses.king_james: Saying, Unto thee will I give the land of Canaan, the lot of your inheritance:

verses.latin_vulgate: cum essent numero brevi,  paucissimi, et incolæ ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּֽ֭הְיוֹתָם מְתֵ֣י מִסְפָּ֑ר כִּ֝מְעַ֗ט וְגָרִ֥ים בָּֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: When they were but a small number: yea very few, and sojourners therein:
verses.finnish_biblia: Koska heitä vähä ja harvat olivat, ja he olivat muukalaiset siinä,
verses.king_james: When they were but a few men in number; yea, very few, and strangers in it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et pertransierunt de gente in gentem,  et de regno ad populum alterum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַ֭יִּֽתְהַלְּכוּ מִגּ֣וֹי אֶל־גּ֑וֹי מִ֝מַּמְלָכָ֗ה אֶל־עַ֥ם אַחֵֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they passed from nation to nation, and from one kingdom to another people.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja vaelsivat kansasta kansaan ja valtakunnasta toiseen kansaan:
verses.king_james: When they went from one nation to another, from one kingdom to another people;

verses.latin_vulgate: Non reliquit hominem nocere eis :  et corripuit pro eis reges.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹא־הִנִּ֣יחַ אָדָ֣ם לְעׇשְׁקָ֑ם וַיּ֖וֹכַח עֲלֵיהֶ֣ם מְלָכִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: He suffered no man to hurt them: and he reproved kings for their sakes.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei hän sallinut yhdenkään ihmisen heitä vahingoittaa, vaan rankaisi kuninkaat heidän tähtensä.
verses.king_james: He suffered no man to do them wrong: yea, he reproved kings for their sakes;

verses.latin_vulgate: Nolite tangere christos meos,  et in prophetis meis nolite malignari.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַֽל־תִּגְּע֥וּ בִמְשִׁיחָ֑י וְ֝לִנְבִיאַ֗י אַל־תָּרֵֽעוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Touch ye not my anointed: and do no evil to my prophets.
verses.finnish_biblia: Älkäät ruvetko minun voideltuihini, ja älkäät tehkö pahaa minun prophetailleni.
verses.king_james: Saying, Touch not mine anointed, and do my prophets no harm.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et vocavit famem super terram,  et omne firmamentum panis contrivit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְרָ֣א רָ֭עָב עַל־הָאָ֑רֶץ כׇּֽל־מַטֵּה־לֶ֥חֶם שָׁבָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he called a famine upon the land: and he broke in pieces all the support of bread.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän kutsui nälän maan päälle, ja vei kaiken leivän varan pois.
verses.king_james: Moreover he called for a famine upon the land: he brake the whole staff of bread.

verses.latin_vulgate: Misit ante eos virum :  in servum venumdatus est, Joseph.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁלַ֣ח לִפְנֵיהֶ֣ם אִ֑ישׁ לְ֝עֶ֗בֶד נִמְכַּ֥ר יוֹסֵֽף׃
verses.douay_rheims: He sent a man before them: Joseph, who was sold for a slave.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän lähetti miehen heidän eteensä: Joseph myytiin orjaksi.
verses.king_james: He sent a man before them, even Joseph, who was sold for a servant:

verses.latin_vulgate: Humiliaverunt in compedibus pedes ejus ;  ferrum pertransiit animam ejus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עִנּ֣וּ בַכֶּ֣בֶל (רגליו) [רַגְל֑וֹ] בַּ֝רְזֶ֗ל בָּ֣אָה נַפְשֽׁוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: They humbled his feet in fetters: the iron pierced his soul,
verses.finnish_biblia: He ahdistivat hänen jalkansa jalkapuuhun: hänen ruumiinsa täytyi raudoissa maata,
verses.king_james: Whose feet they hurt with fetters: he was laid in iron:

verses.latin_vulgate: donec veniret verbum ejus.  Eloquium Domini inflammavit eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַד־עֵ֥ת בֹּא־דְבָר֑וֹ אִמְרַ֖ת יְהֹוָ֣ה צְרָפָֽתְהוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Until his word came. The word of the Lord inflamed him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Siihenasti että hänen sanansa tuli, ja Herran puhe koetteli hänen.
verses.king_james: Until the time that his word came: the word of the Lord tried him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Misit rex, et solvit eum ;  princeps populorum, et dimisit eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁ֣לַח מֶ֭לֶךְ וַיַּתִּירֵ֑הוּ מֹשֵׁ֥ל עַ֝מִּ֗ים וַֽיְפַתְּחֵֽהוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The king sent, and he released him: the ruler of the people, and he set him at liberty.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin lähetti kuningas ja päästi hänen: kansain päämies laski hänen vallallensa,
verses.king_james: The king sent and loosed him; even the ruler of the people, and let him go free.

verses.latin_vulgate: Constituit eum dominum domus suæ,  et principem omnis possessionis suæ :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׂמ֣וֹ אָד֣וֹן לְבֵית֑וֹ וּ֝מֹשֵׁ֗ל בְּכׇל־קִנְיָנֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He made him master of his house, and ruler of all his possession.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja asetti hänen huoneensa herraksi, ja kaiken tavaransa haltiaksi,
verses.king_james: He made him lord of his house, and ruler of all his substance:

verses.latin_vulgate: ut erudiret principes ejus sicut semetipsum,  et senes ejus prudentiam doceret.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֶאְסֹ֣ר שָׂרָ֣יו בְּנַפְשׁ֑וֹ וּזְקֵנָ֥יו יְחַכֵּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: That he might instruct his princes as himself, and teach his ancients wisdom.
verses.finnish_biblia: Opettamaan päämiehiänsä oman tahtonsa jälkeen, ja vanhimmille viisautta.
verses.king_james: To bind his princes at his pleasure; and teach his senators wisdom.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et intravit Israël in Ægyptum,  et Jacob accola fuit in terra Cham.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֣א יִשְׂרָאֵ֣ל מִצְרָ֑יִם וְ֝יַעֲקֹ֗ב גָּ֣ר בְּאֶֽרֶץ־חָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Israel went into Egypt: and Jacob was a sojourner in the land of Cham.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Israel meni Egyptiin, ja Jakob tuli muukalaiseksi Hamin maalle.
verses.king_james: Israel also came into Egypt; and Jacob sojourned in the land of Ham.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et auxit populum suum vehementer,  et firmavit eum super inimicos ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֶּ֣פֶר אֶת־עַמּ֣וֹ מְאֹ֑ד וַ֝יַּעֲצִמֵ֗הוּ מִצָּרָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he increased his people exceedingly: and strengthened them over their enemies.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän antoi kansansa sangen suuresti kasvaa, ja teki heitä väkevämmäksi kuin heidän vihollisensa.
verses.king_james: And he increased his people greatly; and made them stronger than their enemies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Convertit cor eorum, ut odirent populum ejus,  et dolum facerent in servos ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָפַ֣ךְ לִ֭בָּם לִשְׂנֹ֣א עַמּ֑וֹ לְ֝הִתְנַכֵּ֗ל בַּעֲבָדָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: He turned their heart to hate his people: and to deal deceitfully with his servants.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän käänsi heidän sydämensä vihaamaan hänen kansaansa, ja hänen palvelioitansa viekkaudella painamaan alas.
verses.king_james: He turned their heart to hate his people, to deal subtilly with his servants.

verses.latin_vulgate: Misit Moysen servum suum ;  Aaron quem elegit ipsum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁ֭לַח מֹשֶׁ֣ה עַבְדּ֑וֹ אַ֝הֲרֹ֗ן אֲשֶׁ֣ר בָּחַר־בּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He sent Moses his servant: Aaron the man whom he had chosen.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän lähetti palveliansa Moseksen, ja Aaronin, jonka hän valitsi.
verses.king_james: He sent Moses his servant; and Aaron whom he had chosen.

verses.latin_vulgate: Posuit in eis verba signorum suorum,  et prodigiorum in terra Cham.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָֽׂמוּ־בָ֭ם דִּבְרֵ֣י אֹתוֹתָ֑יו וּ֝מֹפְתִ֗ים בְּאֶ֣רֶץ חָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: He gave them power to shew them signs, and his wonders in the land of Cham.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ne tekivät hänen merkkinsä heidän seassansa, ja hänen ihmeensä Hamin maalla.
verses.king_james: They shewed his signs among them, and wonders in the land of Ham.

verses.latin_vulgate: Misit tenebras, et obscuravit ;  et non exacerbavit sermones suos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁ֣לַֽח חֹ֭שֶׁךְ וַיַּחְשִׁ֑ךְ וְלֹא־מָ֝ר֗וּ אֶת־[דְּבָרֽוֹ] (דבריו)׃
verses.douay_rheims: He sent darkness, and made it obscure: and grieved not his words.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän antoi pimeyden tulla, ja sen pimeytti; ja ei olleet he hänen sanoillensa kuulemattomat.
verses.king_james: He sent darkness, and made it dark; and they rebelled not against his word.

verses.latin_vulgate: Convertit aquas eorum in sanguinem,  et occidit pisces eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָפַ֣ךְ אֶת־מֵימֵיהֶ֣ם לְדָ֑ם וַ֝יָּ֗מֶת אֶת־דְּגָתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: He turned their waters into blood, and destroyed their fish.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän muutti heidän vetensä vereksi ja kuoletti heidän kalansa.
verses.king_james: He turned their waters into blood, and slew their fish.

verses.latin_vulgate: Edidit terra eorum ranas  in penetralibus regum ipsorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁרַ֣ץ אַרְצָ֣ם צְפַרְדְּעִ֑ים בְּ֝חַדְרֵ֗י מַלְכֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Their land brought forth frogs, in the inner chambers of their kings.
verses.finnish_biblia: Heidän maansa kuohutti sammakoita, heidän kuningastensa kammioissa.
verses.king_james: Their land brought forth frogs in abundance, in the chambers of their kings.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixit, et venit cœnomyia et ciniphes  in omnibus finibus eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָ֭מַר וַיָּבֹ֣א עָרֹ֑ב כִּ֝נִּ֗ים בְּכׇל־גְּבוּלָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: He spoke, and there came divers sorts of flies and sciniphs in all their coasts.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän sanoi, niin turilaat ja täit tulivat heidän maansa ääriin.
verses.king_james: He spake, and there came divers sorts of flies, and lice in all their coasts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Posuit pluvias eorum grandinem :  ignem comburentem in terra ipsorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נָתַ֣ן גִּשְׁמֵיהֶ֣ם בָּרָ֑ד אֵ֖שׁ לֶהָב֣וֹת בְּאַרְצָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: He gave them hail for rain, a burning fire in the land.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän antoi rakeet heille sateeksi, tulen liekit heidän maallensa,
verses.king_james: He gave them hail for rain, and flaming fire in their land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et percussit vineas eorum, et ficulneas eorum,  et contrivit lignum finium eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֣ךְ גַּ֭פְנָם וּתְאֵנָתָ֑ם וַ֝יְשַׁבֵּ֗ר עֵ֣ץ גְּבוּלָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he destroyed their vineyards and their fig trees: and he broke in pieces the trees of their coasts.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja löi heidän viinapuunsa ja fikunapuunsa, ja särki puut heidän maansa äärissä.
verses.king_james: He smote their vines also and their fig trees; and brake the trees of their coasts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixit, et venit locusta,  et bruchus cujus non erat numerus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָ֭מַר וַיָּבֹ֣א אַרְבֶּ֑ה וְ֝יֶ֗לֶק וְאֵ֣ין מִסְפָּֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: He spoke, and the locust came, and the bruchus, of which there was no number.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän sanoi, niin tulivat epälukuiset paarmat ja vapsaiset,
verses.king_james: He spake, and the locusts came, and caterpillers, and that without number,

verses.latin_vulgate: et comedit omne fœnum in terra eorum,  et comedit omnem fructum terræ eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אכַל כׇּל־עֵ֣שֶׂב בְּאַרְצָ֑ם וַ֝יֹּ֗אכַל פְּרִ֣י אַדְמָתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they devoured all the grass in their land, and consumed all the fruit of their ground.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ne söivät kaiken ruohon heidän maaltansa, ja ne söivät heidän maansa hedelmän.
verses.king_james: And did eat up all the herbs in their land, and devoured the fruit of their ground.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et percussit omne primogenitum in terra eorum,  primitias omnis laboris eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֣ךְ כׇּל־בְּכ֣וֹר בְּאַרְצָ֑ם רֵ֝אשִׁ֗ית לְכׇל־אוֹנָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he slew all the firstborn in their land: the firstfruits of all their labour.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän löi kaikki esikoiset heidän maallansa, ensimäiset kaikesta heidän voimastansa,
verses.king_james: He smote also all the firstborn in their land, the chief of all their strength.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et eduxit eos cum argento et auro,  et non erat in tribubus eorum infirmus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽ֭יּוֹצִיאֵם בְּכֶ֣סֶף וְזָהָ֑ב וְאֵ֖ין בִּשְׁבָטָ֣יו כּוֹשֵֽׁל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he brought them out with silver and gold: and there was not among their tribes one that was feeble.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja vei heitä hopialla ja kullalla ulos: ja ei ollut heidän sukukunnissansa yksikään sairas.
verses.king_james: He brought them forth also with silver and gold: and there was not one feeble person among their tribes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lætata est Ægyptus in profectione eorum,  quia incubuit timor eorum super eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׂמַ֣ח מִצְרַ֣יִם בְּצֵאתָ֑ם כִּֽי־נָפַ֖ל פַּחְדָּ֣ם עֲלֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Egypt was glad when they departed: for the fear of them lay upon them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Egypti iloitsi heidän lähtemisestänsä; sillä heidän pelkonsa oli tullut heidän päällensä.
verses.king_james: Egypt was glad when they departed: for the fear of them fell upon them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Expandit nubem in protectionem eorum,  et ignem ut luceret eis per noctem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פָּרַ֣שׂ עָנָ֣ן לְמָסָ֑ךְ וְ֝אֵ֗שׁ לְהָאִ֥יר לָֽיְלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: He spread a cloud for their protection, and fire to give them light in the night.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän levitti pilven verhoksi ja tulen yötä valistamaan.
verses.king_james: He spread a cloud for a covering; and fire to give light in the night.

verses.latin_vulgate: Petierunt, et venit coturnix,  et pane cæli saturavit eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁ֭אַל וַיָּבֵ֣א שְׂלָ֑ו וְלֶ֥חֶם שָׁ֝מַ֗יִם יַשְׂבִּיעֵֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: They asked, and the quail came: and he filled them with the bread of heaven.
verses.finnish_biblia: He anoivat, niin antoi hän metsäkanat tulla, ja ravitsi heitä taivaan leivällä.
verses.king_james: The people asked, and he brought quails, and satisfied them with the bread of heaven.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dirupit petram, et fluxerunt aquæ :  abierunt in sicco flumina.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פָּ֣תַח צ֭וּר וַיָּז֣וּבוּ מָ֑יִם הָ֝לְכ֗וּ בַּצִּיּ֥וֹת נָהָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: He opened the rock, and waters flowed: rivers ran down in the dry land.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän avasi kallion, niin vesi vuoti, ja virrat juoksivat kuivaa myöten.
verses.king_james: He opened the rock, and the waters gushed out; they ran in the dry places like a river.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam memor fuit verbi sancti sui,  quod habuit ad Abraham puerum suum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־זָ֭כַר אֶת־דְּבַ֣ר קׇדְשׁ֑וֹ אֶֽת־אַבְרָהָ֥ם עַבְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Because he remembered his holy word, which he had spoken to his servant Abraham.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä hän muisti pyhän sanansa, jonka hän palveliallensa Abrahamille puhunut oli,
verses.king_james: For he remembered his holy promise, and Abraham his servant.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et eduxit populum suum in exsultatione,  et electos suos in lætitia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיּוֹצִ֣א עַמּ֣וֹ בְשָׂשׂ֑וֹן בְּ֝רִנָּ֗ה אֶת־בְּחִירָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he brought forth his people with joy, and his chosen with gladness.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja vei kansansa ilolla ulos, ja valittunsa riemulla,
verses.king_james: And he brought forth his people with joy, and his chosen with gladness:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dedit illis regiones gentium,  et labores populorum possederunt :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתֵּ֣ן לָ֭הֶם אַרְצ֣וֹת גּוֹיִ֑ם וַעֲמַ֖ל לְאֻמִּ֣ים יִירָֽשׁוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he gave them the lands of the Gentiles: and they possessed the labours of the people:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja antoi heille pakanain maan, niin että he kansain hyvyydet omistivat heillensä.
verses.king_james: And gave them the lands of the heathen: and they inherited the labour of the people;

verses.latin_vulgate: ut custodiant justificationes ejus,  et legem ejus requirant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּעֲב֤וּר ׀ יִשְׁמְר֣וּ חֻ֭קָּיו וְתוֹרֹתָ֥יו יִנְצֹ֗רוּ הַֽלְלוּ־יָֽהּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: That they might observe his justifications, and seek after his law.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että he pitäisivät hänen säätynsä, ja hänen lakinsa kätkisivät, Halleluja!
verses.king_james: That they might observe his statutes, and keep his laws. Praise ye the Lord.
